nodes.label: Planned Pixel Agent — Automatic Article Illustration Generator
nodes.rationale: Pixel agent was planned (not yet built) because Gemini Imagen 3 requires billing enabled which the owner has not set up; Pollinations.ai is free with no key required. The agent would read article title+excerpt, generate an English prompt, fetch from Pollinations.ai, save as .jpg, and patch the article frontmatter with an image field before running build.js.
nodes.norm_label: planned pixel agent — automatic article illustration generator

nodes.label: js/quotes.js — Live Price Snapshot (overrides data.js prices)

nodes.label: Supported Stocks Constraint — syms Must Match STOCKS List
nodes.rationale: Articles can only reference tickers present in STOCKS (js/data.js) because the web renders stock chips and charts dynamically from this list; an unknown ticker causes broken UI elements. Supported tickers: NVDA AAPL MSFT AMZN GOOGL META TSLA AMD JPM NFLX.
nodes.norm_label: supported stocks constraint — syms must match stocks list
